name_cn:
Genuine leather
Ruffled Nappa leather bracelet bag
9751
Color: Eucalyptus Green
This versatile tubular bag is made of ruffled Nappa sheep leather and can be worn as a bracelet. Both ends are decorated with embossed sheep leather plates.
Removable and adjustable strap, snap button closure
Zipper closure, matching pull tab
No lining
Anagram embossed 25-10-10
